name: KidLearnPro
description:
KidLearn Pro — Fun Learning App for Kids! ⭐

A safe, ad-free educational app designed for children ages 2-8 to learn 
ABC, Numbers, Arabic letters, and Math through fun interactive games!

🔤 ABC ENGLISH (Free)
Learn all 26 letters with pictures, voice pronunciation, and fun quizzes.

🔢 NUMBERS 1-10 (Free)
Count with colorful emoji and engaging visuals.

🎨 MORE FUN (Free)
Animal sounds, color recognition, and a free drawing canvas.

🌙 ARABIC LETTERS (Premium)
All 28 Arabic letters with authentic Arabic voice pronunciation.

➕➖ MATH (Premium)
50 levels of addition and subtraction practice.

✨ FEATURES
• Voice pronunciation in English & Arabic
• Star rewards system to track progress
• Cloud save — progress syncs across devices
• Global leaderboard
• Parent Dashboard with PIN protection
• Daily goals & progress tracking
• 100% safe — no ads, no social features
• Works offline after first load

👨‍👩‍👧 PARENT DASHBOARD
Monitor your child's learning progress, set daily goals, manage 
subjects, and track time spent — all protected with a PIN code.

🔒 SAFE FOR KIDS
No advertisements. No in-app chat. No external links for children. 
Built with child safety as the top priority.

⭐ PREMIUM — $1.99/month
Unlock Arabic letters and 50 Math levels for the complete learning 
experience.

Perfect for toddlers, preschoolers, and early learners!
